CustomField.description: Monthly Threshold Amount: This represents the minimum monthly charge in the Maintenance Reserve rate currency. Choose to enter either this amount or the Threshold Units and Rate. This field effectively overrides the Threshold Amount (Precise) field, which originally has a precision of six decimal places.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Monthly Threshold Amount: This represents the minimum monthly charge in the Maintenance Reserve rate currency. Choose to enter either this amount or the Threshold Units and Rate. This field effectively overrides the Threshold Amount (Precise) field, which originally has a precision of six decimal places.
CustomField.label: Threshold Amount
